original_snippet_context: Article criticizing the management of the Banco do Brasil and its relationship with the government.
relevant_quote: O Banco nega-se a emprestar dinheiro ao commercio honesto, ao commercio que luta, trabalha e paga as suas contas; no entretanto, porque um jornal se presta a defender as palafitas do governo [...] esse jornal vae ao Banco e suspende quantas avulsas.
justification: While the text criticizes the bank's lending practices and its relationship with a pro-government newspaper, this doesn't clearly align with either the orthodox or expansionist view of the Caixa de Conversão. The criticism focuses on corruption and favoritism, not monetary policy.
